brand-story-img-3c7d1e.query: Velmora was founded to bridge the space between fast-fashion jewelry and unattainable luxury. Each piece is crafted in small batches using 18K gold plating over brass, with a commitment to ethical sourcing and timeless design. We believe the jewelry you wear every day should feel as precious as the moments it marks. Born from a belief that luxury should be personal, not performative.
